capabilities.name: Bill of Materials Design
capabilities.description: Create and validate multi-level BOMs, component lines, operations, by-products, and variant-specific BOMs.
examples: Design a BOM with operations and raw materials
Convert a normal BOM to a phantom (kit) BOM
Add a by-product line to capture scrap value

capabilities.name: Routing & Operations
capabilities.description: Define operation sequences, default work centers, setup/operation time, and attach routings to BOMs.
examples: Create a routing with three sequential operations
Set operation time based on number of pieces
Attach a routing to multiple BOMs

capabilities.name: Work Center Management
capabilities.description: Configure work centers with capacity, calendars, costs, alternative centers, and OEE targets.
examples: Add an alternative work center for overflow capacity
Configure OEE targets and loss reasons
Set hourly cost for work center routing

capabilities.name: Manufacturing Orders & Scheduling
capabilities.description: Manage the full MO lifecycle from creation to close, including reservation, planning, and backorders.
examples: Confirm an MO and reserve components
Plan MO start date based on routing lead time
Handle a partial production backorder

capabilities.name: Work Orders & Shop Floor
capabilities.description: Execute work orders on the shop floor, log operator time, record production, and track OEE.
examples: Start and complete a work order from the tablet view
Record downtime and scrap per operation
Print a shop floor work order travelers report

capabilities.name: Subcontracting
capabilities.description: Send components to a subcontractor and receive finished goods through a dedicated subcontracting workflow.
examples: Configure a partner as a subcontractor
Create a subcontracting BOM and PO
Track raw material valuation at subcontractor location

capabilities.name: By-Products & Scrap
capabilities.description: Report additional products produced during manufacturing and account for scrap with reasons.
examples: Add by-products to a BOM
Report scrap from a work order
Analyze scrap reasons by operation

capabilities.name: MRP Planning & Procurement
capabilities.description: Run the MRP scheduler, interpret procurement exceptions, and configure replenishment strategies.
examples: Run the MRP scheduler manually
Create a reordering rule for a component
Resolve a procurement exception

capabilities.name: Quality Integration
capabilities.description: Integrate quality control points and checks with manufacturing operations and finished products.
examples: Create a control point on a work order operation
Block MO completion until quality check passes
Record measured values during production
